specs.title: AC2: Search input and filter controls are visible
AC3: Invoice table shows expected columns or empty state
AC4: Clicking an invoice row navigates to detail page
Edge: Empty invoice list shows appropriate empty state
AC1: Initiate delivery report from PO → form pre-populated with line items; specify qty + outcome per item
AC2: Delivery person scans QR/tokenized URL → enter name+email, receive 15-min OTP, access delivery report
AC3: External delivery report submitted → CA reviews, approves/rejects with comment; only approved affects PO status
Edge: 100% defects reported → delivery marked rejected, vendor+office notified, PO cannot move to Delivered
AC1: New warehouse request from field → appears in "New warehouse requests" queue with project, requester, item count
AC2: WH Officer opens request → confirm items in-stock/out-of-stock; out-of-stock triggers notification to requester
AC3: All items picked → mark "Ready for pickup" or "Sent to jobsite" → requester and admin notified
AC4: Barcode scanner → scan material → shows stock level, incoming/outgoing history, associated projects
Edge: Item with zero stock → marked out-of-stock, requester notified, can escalate to new RFQ
Edge: Barcode scan no match → prompted to add manually or report as unrecognised material
AC1: Foreman offline creates material request with items+photos → saved as draft locally; syncs on connectivity → appears in warehouse queue
AC2: Foreman assigned to 3 projects → switch between projects on home screen, see pending deliveries + drafts per project
AC3: Delivery arrives → open delivery confirmation for PO, photograph, mark each item received/short/damaged, submit
AC4: Defect reported → office team + vendor notified with details+photos, message thread opened on PO
Edge: Offline request + same item already ordered by office → on sync, system flags potential duplicates for PO review
AC1: Only authorized users can initiate Change Order on Approved/Active PO; cannot create for terminal statuses
AC2: Change Order allows updating: quantities, items (add/remove/substitute), prices, delivery dates, commercial terms
AC3: System classifies as Minor/Major based on configurable rules; classification visible before submission
AC4: Minor → auto-approved, PO updated with new version (v2, v3), logged in Change History
AC5: Major → Pending Approval, sent to approver(s); approvers can Approve/Reject with comment
AC6: Approved → PO updated + new version, vendor+stakeholders notified. Rejected → original PO unchanged, rejection reason shown
AC7: Full audit trail: initiator, approver(s), timestamps, before/after values; viewable from PO Details
AC8: Required fields validated before submission; prevents negative qty, invalid date with actionable errors
Edge: Change Order submitted but PO closed before approval → auto-rejected with system note
Edge: Minor change auto-approves but PO total exceeds project budget → warning to CA+FO, PO flagged over-budget
AC1: CA invites vendor — company + rep emails receive invitation, vendor listed as Invited
